action_set_definitions.name: get_observation_queue
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current list of pending observation targets, including their categories, priority levels, and celestial coordinates (Declination).

action_set_definitions.name: get_storage_status
action_set_definitions.description: Returns the amount of available storage space in GB.

action_set_definitions.name: purge_data_blocks
action_set_definitions.description: Removes data blocks of a specified type to free up storage space.

data_block_type.description: The label of the data blocks to be deleted (e.g., 'Temporary_Calibration').

action_set_definitions.name: set_optical_filter
action_set_definitions.description: Rotates the filter wheel to the specified photometric filter.

action_set_definitions.name: slew_to_target
action_set_definitions.description: Moves the telescope mount to the coordinates associated with a target ID.

target_id.description: The ID of the object to point at.

action_set_definitions.name: get_environment_telemetry
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves real-time weather and environmental data including humidity.

action_set_definitions.name: wait_for_duration
action_set_definitions.description: Pauses the agent execution for a specified amount of time.

action_set_definitions.name: set_dome_shutter
action_set_definitions.description: Controls the physical state of the observatory dome shutter.

open.description: True to open, False to close.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_exposure
action_set_definitions.description: Triggers the camera sensor to capture data for a specific duration.

exposure_time_seconds.description: Length of the exposure in seconds.

state_description.current_pointing: The current celestial coordinates the telescope is pointing at.
state_description.weather_condition: Current environmental parameters affecting observation quality.
state_description.dome_shutter_open: Whether the telescope dome shutter is currently open.
state_description.active_filter: The current optical filter in the light path (e.g., 'U', 'B', 'V', 'R', 'I', 'Clear').
state_description.time_utc: The current simulated UTC time in ISO 8601 format.
state_description.available_storage_gb: Remaining storage space for observation data in Gigabytes.
